audience.zh: 适合已经理解基础 ML 概念、想进一步做 LLM 产品原型的开发者
audience.en: Best for developers who know core ML concepts and want to prototype LLM products

summary.zh: 关注向量检索、评估、提示工程与产品化边界，帮助你从 demo 走向更稳的原型。
summary.en: Focus on retrieval, evaluation, prompting, and product boundaries so you can move from demos to sturdier prototypes.

zh: 理解 LLM 应用中的上下文注入与评估逻辑
知道什么时候该用 RAG、什么时候该缩小任务范围
能设计一个更贴近真实用户场景的 AI 功能原型
en: Understand context injection and evaluation tradeoffs in LLM apps
Know when to use RAG and when to narrow the problem instead
Design AI product prototypes that map closer to real user behavior
